description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespace if needed. Update all related Spring dependencies (Spring Security, Spring Data, Spring Cloud, etc.) to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4. Address any breaking API changes introduced in the target versions.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded Java from 8 to 21 and Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.4.5. Spring Framework upgraded to 6.2.x. Migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespace using OpenRewrite recipes. Updated commons-io to 2.18.0 to fix CVE-2024-47554. Build passes and all unit tests pass.
